hero.title: Resolve ECM issues, faster.
hero.subtitle: ECM Support is your single workspace to report, track, and resolve ECM Business Suite issues — with the right people on every ticket.

about.title: About ECM Support
about.body: We help teams keep their ECM Business Suite running smoothly. Report an issue, follow it through a clear workflow, and collaborate with engineers and reviewers until it is resolved.
about.point2: Role-based workflows for engineers and reviewers

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: The people behind ECM Support.

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.subtitle: Trusted by teams that rely on ECM.
partners.empty: Our partners will be listed here soon.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Have a question or an issue? Send us a message and we will get back to you.
